name: Stinkbug
description: A large and dangerous insect that mixes physical attacks with lingering gas clouds. Without gas protection it can overwhelm unprepared players very quickly.
behavior: It patrols and sleeps in its spawn areas. In combat it alternates a simple bite, a leaping slam that leaves gas on impact, and a passive gas release that contaminates the area for several seconds.
interactionWithPlayer: It becomes hostile as soon as it detects you and can quickly flood the area with gas. A Gas Mask or Gastro Goo makes the fight far more manageable.
interactionWithCreatures: It is usually neutral toward other creatures, but its gas clouds often cause them to defend themselves and turn hostile toward it.
strategy: You want Tier 2 gear or a direct answer to the gas. Its bite and leap are fairly blockable, but the real threat is staying inside the cloud. If you fight several at once, gas protection stops being optional.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Bite: 50. Gas Leap: 65. The cloud deals 7 damage per second.

inflicts: Its bite deals chopping damage, the leap deals busting damage, and its clouds apply continuous gas hazard.
specialTraits: It is immune to woozy buildup.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: It winds up a basic blockable bite.

abilities.name: Gas Leap
abilities.description: It leans back, leaps forward, and leaves a gas cloud at the impact point.

abilities.name: Gas Release
abilities.description: It creates a lingering gas cloud around itself.
